blocks.text: Temoto

You searched for glory, but you found death. You were our protector who bravely rushed into the battle to save the rest of the tokens. You defeated CryptoKitties and Etherboths. You've done so much for us. Thank you, brother, for your courage and self-sacrifice. We will remember your deeds forever.
Jay

You went through a lot. You've lost everyone you loved. Now you're dead too. You were a good guy, Jay. You never betrayed your friends, and you were fair with your enemies. Ben taught you not only the art of fighting, but also the art of healing hearts and souls. We'll really miss you, brother. Rest in peace.
Zergaldo

You heard voices. Why did they not warn you about the danger? Why did not they give you a chance to save your life? We've lost a brave warrior who saw many glorious battles. Perhaps in death you will find out whose voices were in your head.
Corley

Oh, Corley! You were a desperate bastard! You loved your guns so much that you even slept hugging them. But your guns could not save you from death. Well, now that you're dead there are fewer psychopathic maniacs in the world.
Edmund the Wise

The world is dead, and now so are you. Edmund, you were a romantic and a womanizer, even though you were an aggressive son of a bitch who enjoyed spilling enemy blood. Maybe you died to find Kate in death and stare at her short shorts again.
The Eye

Your main mission was to protect every token of the community, and it worked very well for you. You spent so much time in the desert to find your main purpose in life. Now you're dead. Maybe this is how it was supposed to end, or maybe it's just a stupid coincidence. Who knows?
Dr. Jonas Busch

Mad genius. That's who you were. Dangerous, tactical and very, very evil. You were not the doctor you wanted to go to for help. You were the doctor who wanted to resurrect the dead. Now you yourself are dead, and we certainly will not try to get you back to life. You've done enough for this world.
Valentine

Daddy loved you so much that you grew up a total sociopath. Yes, a sociopath with a sense of justice, but still a sociopath. Therefore, we both loved and feared you at the same time. You must have been a good girl, but we will never know. You hated communicating with anyone, except for your imaginary friend. That's okay. Now, in death, you have surely reunited with your daddy and started building your own empire.
Danko

You were such a bore! Your speech about hoodies being better than cloaks could lull anyone! For this we hated you. But this, of course, was not your main quality. We admired your belief in victory, we liked that you always found a way out of any dead end. You burned like a torch, and we walked hand in hand with you. Rest in peace, brother.
Daedalus

We admired your sharp mind, you were truly a mad genius. We would not have survived in the desert without your crazy inventions. You drew inspiration from the war and showed us that engineering is an art. We all will remember you forever. Especially Dustin, the cyborg you created.
Silence
The only thing you ever said was "M-mmm-mm". We never understood why you had a sealed mouth. We were always wondering if Silence was your real name. Is that a name at all? The Devil only knows.
Nao

Your wisdom knew no bounds, and you led us to freedom. You were a fighter for truth and justice. Old man, we are so grateful to you. We could not have wished for a better leader. You motivated us, and without your impassioned speeches our hearts would have hardened long ago. Nao, we will miss you and your kindness. Rest in peace, friend.
Dustin

Fuck, not all of us even realized that Dustin was a damn cyborg. A cyborg! Did he have any feelings at all? Did he love anyone? For as long as we remember, he was cold, practical and very secretive. He died on the same day as his creator. There is something poetic about this, not that Dustin could appreciate its beauty. He's not even 100% a token.
Black Hat

You had rather big problems with your head, man. You wanted to get rid of all the criminals the world, but you yourself were a criminal. See the irony? You did, however, almost make it. You're dead, and there's one less criminal in the world.
Noir

You believed in God and divine salvation, but God did not care about you. Or maybe you have met him in death. Maybe you have become friends, and now watch those who wander through the desert together. You did not want to be a savior, but no one gave you the right to choose. Wherever you are in death, we hope that you have found peace.
Rad

You wanted to buy your life from Death so much. But you could not offer Her anything in return. You cannot deceive Death, even if you are a very famous merchant. Thank you for teaching us to buy cheap and sell expensive. We hope that in death you receive all the money in the world.
Roosevelt

A rude, lying bastard. You were absolutely crazy. We were scared of you because we never knew what to expect from you. You were a real psychopath. But you defended us from enemies, because in battle you had no equal. Thanks and bye, Roosevelt.
Carlos

You were the only one who liked the desert. All the wandering through the sand, the poisonous eblygas that crawled under our feet. You said that the best part was that we were still alive, and that we could move our feet. Your optimism corrupted us, and we continued walking, inspired by your speeches. You often talked about some horse. We do not know what a "horse" is, but we hope that you have found it in death.
Narciss

You were always smart, too smart for us. Your tediousness knew no bounds. At last, there will be no moral guidelines anymore. At last, we can do everything as we want, and not the way you think is right. You were smart, but now you are dead. So how smart could you really have been?
